description: Composition White pyjamas made of cotton fabric, has two pockets on the sides and elastic waistband with drawstrings Fit Regular Wash care Hand wash separately in cold water using mild detergent Dry in shade Do not soak Crafted from soft cotton, these pyjamas from fabindia make a great addition to your semi-formal traditional wardrobe. Pair them with a semi-formal or ethnic shirt, and slip into suede shoes. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and waist 32"
